{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Soulspace
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Constructs can be stored in a [[soulspace]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c7">''Uncrowned'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
